io.github.igorgf.control.Either

Packages that use Either
Package
Description
io.github.igorgf.control
Core functional control-flow types for error handling and value presence.

  • Uses of Either in io.github.igorgf.control

    Class
    Description
    (package private) final record 
    Left<L,R>
    The left L value implementation of Either<L, R>.
    (package private) final record 
    Right<L,R>
    The right R value implementation of Either<L, R>.

    static <L,R> Either<L,R>
    Either.left(L value)
    Factory method for creating a new Left<L, R> instance.
    static <L,R> Either<L,R>
    Either.right(R value)
    Factory method for creating a new RightLeft<L, R> instance.
    Either<R,L>
    Either.swap()
    Swaps the left and right values into their opposite container, preserving the type information.
    Either<R,L>
    Left.swap()
    Converts this Left into a Right<R, L> containing Left.value().
    Either<R,L>
    Right.swap()
    Converts this Right into a Left<R, L> containing Right.value().
